description: EMERGENCY: Roads completely submerged in water
Major flooding - most of road flooded
examples: Streets completely flooded, water blocking all lanes
Monsoon floods, heavy rains, water damage
Trees, dense grass, vegetation blocking roads

description: Dense vegetation on or near roads
examples: Overgrown vegetation, trees, grass affecting passage

description: Large deep potholes creating vehicle hazard
examples: Massive holes, deep craters in road

description: Severe road damage - chunks missing or large cracks
examples: Missing pavement, large cracks, deteriorated road

description: CRITICAL: Extensive potholes across large area

examples: Downed power lines, exposed cables, wires
Dusty roads, sand storms, poor air quality

description: Dark unlit areas - poor visibility hazard
examples: Broken lights, dark paths, poor lighting

description: Clogged stormwater drains blocking water flow

examples: Water flowing from pipes, leaking supply
